feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,125,196Chapters: 137/?Kudos: 1,701

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin

entry.title: All the things I said
entry.summary:
Author: gloriask

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,864Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Warm breath brushed against his ear as the man leaned closer. “On your knees, sorcerer,” Arthur's voice said quietly. “And don’t you dare try anything.” Merlin’s chest tightened painfully. For a moment he couldn’t breathe. “…Arthur,” he whispered hoarsely. The name barely left his lips before he was hauled roughly onto his back. The world spun as Arthur flipped him over, shoving him flat against the forest floor.In which Arthur was cursed, and he did terrible things that hurt Merlin.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.summary:
Author: My_Sweet_Prince

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,802Chapters: 14/15Kudos: 42

entry.title: Master of Time: Advisor of Kings
entry.summary:
Author: jaqtkd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,147Chapters: 7/11Kudos: 12

Summary: The 'Master of Time' Series: A group of stories about Merlin's life after 5x13 and how he comes to fully understand his Destiny and 'The Once and Future King' prophecies. Book 2: Many years have passed and Merlin is continuing to seek out his reincarnated friends and form friendships with their families whilst he eagerly awaits the most important re-birth of all. Much has changed but much remains the same. What role will Arthur play this time around and how can Merlin help? This story is non-linear and based on real, historical characters from the Ninth and Tenth Century so, enjoy the ride!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: That Which Cannot Die
entry.summary:
Author: IIALFAII

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 88,402Chapters: 11/20Kudos: 421

Summary: When Merlin is lost to Arthur in a way he cannot cope with, the prince is left shattered - adrift in a world colder and lonelier than he ever imagined. But grief is only the beginning. When Merlin returns, unchanged and without memory of being gone, or why, Arthur confronts a truth he never expected: He cannot live without Merlin, for he is the half that makes him whole. Together, they must navigate the revelation of a huge secret, danger, and their own hearts - discovering that love can rise from even the darkest of tragedies, and that some souls are destined to be forever entwined.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,010Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 34

Summary: "Was there... was there truly a need for you to kiss me, Merlin?" "You were drowning, Arthur. Believe me, kissing a stubborn, ungrateful royal idiot was not on my itinerary today." One is an Ezaki, a prince searching for the Lake of Avalon to tear down the walls between their worlds. The other is a sorcerer, risking everything to seal the sword forever within its hidden waters. Beginning in Constantinople, the heart of the Eastern Roman Empire, and stretching deep into the Sassanid Empire to the ancient city of Gundeshapur—this is a journey set in 540 AD, where real historical events interweave with a high-stakes "Enemies to Lovers" romance. ✾ Long ago, as humans and Ezakis faced mutual destruction, their kings knelt before the sacred sword in the Lake of Avalon. A history written in blood was sealed with peace, and the Khazar Era began. Until Uther Pendragon rose to power and turned that peace to ash. Desperate, humanity turned back to Avalon. The lake's magic raised a colossal, insurmountable wall between the two realms. The magic was never to be broken; the gate, never opened. Yet, on the day the world tore in two, a power was born to change everything—Merlin.

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 383,894Chapters: 81/110Kudos: 3,609

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: Do you love him?
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,644Chapters: 7/50Kudos: 216

Summary: "Do you love him?” Queen Ygraine asks the question gently, but Arthur knows better than to mistake gentleness for mercy. He has come to ask permission to formally court Merlin: son of Balinor, Chief Dragonlord of Albion, and Hunith, Ygraine’s trusted lady-in-waiting. It should be simple. It is not. Because Merlin is not only the man Arthur loves. He is Dragonkind’s future, Dafyd’s blood, Druid-touched magic, and a sovereignty older than Pendragon law. In a Camelot where Ygraine survived and magic returned to public life, Albion has rebuilt itself around a fragile peace between Crown, Dragonkind, the Old Religion, and the old threshold kingdoms. But restoration is not the same as healing. As Arthur and Merlin’s courtship becomes public, Ascetir’s roots begin to stir, Dafyd’s tidal arches hum at the wrong tide, Avalon’s mists remember what Camelot forgot, and old roads bend toward the Forest of Balor and the Great Stones of Nemeton. Something wounded beneath Albion has begun to ask for witness. Or: Ygraine lives, Arthur loves Merlin openly, and Albion discovers that love is not weakness, possession, or conquest — but covenant.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: To Weather The Storm
entry.summary:
Author: raspberry_mouse

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,831Chapters: 5/30Kudos: 16

Summary: A dark force moves on the woods and villages of Camelot and the surrounding lands, swallowing people and places of magic, disrupting the balance. Uneasy, the Druids seek Merlin's help. Under the nose of King Uther, the Round Table seeks to investigate this series of mysterious disturbances. Eager to keep the commoner knights away during Samhain celebrations, Uther grants Sirs Lancelot, Elyan, and Gwaine permission to travel— but on their journey to rendezvous with the Druids, Gwaine is taken. Battered and bruised, Lancelot and Elyan race back to Camelot to inform the others. Worried for their comrade, the Round Table set out after Gwaine, while Gwaine finds himself unexpectedly reunited with an old friend. Can the prisoners thwart the machinations of their jailkeepers? Can the Round Table rescue them before the Druids' secrets are revealed? Who moves in the shadows of Camelot, and what will they will they sacrifice to their quest for power? Through it all, can Merlin, Morgana and the Round Table avoid Uther Pendragon's suspicion, and his wrath? S2, post Witchfinder :)  Tags will be updated as I go. Please be kind, and tell me if you see typos!!Okay love you bye <3

entry.title: The Scar Between Us
entry.summary:
Author: DILLIGAF_iykyk

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,048Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 14

Summary: The bandits came from the tree line like shadows given teeth. Arthur had his sword drawn before the first cry rang out, steel singing free of the scabbard as he pivoted toward the rush of bodies.They were outnumbered—six knights against what looked like twenty men, ragged and desperate, pouring from the dark wood on either side of the forest road.

entry.title: The Stars and Cold to see us Smile
entry.summary:
Author: Dinosaurwriter

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 610Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: Someone is awaiting royalty to look at the stars in the cold basement. (A small snippet)-- TW: mentioned in the beginning notes. Make sure to look after yourself and click off if it is too much!!!Constructive Criticism is welcome! :)I do not own BBC Merlin Series, rights to the creators. All referenced content has links and references where appropriate, my own work is the writing and title, with small references to the show and other media (credited)I don’t condone any translations or publishing of my work on this site or any other. I don’t condone the use of ai to my work at all or my ao3 account. Title is my own words, please give authors credit where it is due!

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,036Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 49

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon's protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon's curse begins to stir - and Uther Pendragon's madness stands as a warning - Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: pranks can only go so far
entry.summary:
Author: arxticflavor

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,087Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Under the dim and flickering lights, and ‘killer’ that is about to kill them, Merlin would never, not ever, in his entire life, expect Arthur Pendragon's apparent last words:“I—I love you!”Merlin and the others are finally fed up with their boss's stupid and childish pranks thrown at them.Together, they team up and scheme their revenge prank against Arthur that may or may not cost their jobs.And of course, the man that is a frequent victim to Arthur's antics, wants to see it happen with his own two eyes.

entry.title: A Ruler With No Kingdom
entry.summary:
Author: andromaex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,083Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Arthur returns expecting to save Albion. Instead, he finds Merlin. After fifteen hundred years of waiting, loneliness, and loss, Merlin is no longer the young man Arthur left behind. But as they rebuild what time stole from them, Arthur begins to realize there may have been something between them all along. Unfortunately, saving the world is still on the agenda.
